issues.message: Module has 20 cells — approaching station limit (16 recommended max).
Safety Violation: Cell_03 and Cell_04 are 43.0mm apart. Min required: 48.0mm (45mm + 3mm gap).
Cell_18 extends outside module tray on X-axis. Cell at x=0.520m, tray width=0.500m.
OUT OF REACH: Cell_20 at [0.520, 0.250, 0.000] is 0.580m too far. KUKA_KR6 max reach is 0.900m from base at [0.0, -0.5, 0.0].
